overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in white clothing walking along a coastal beach during a golden hour sunset. The character transitions from a paved promenade onto sandy beach and into shallow ocean water, with other pedestrians and distant vehicles visible in the scenic coastal environment.

events.description: character steps off paved promenade onto sandy beach

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved promenade before stepping onto the sand

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the promenade wall

entered.detail: low stone wall separating promenade from beach
sun setting over the ocean with orange glow
dark sand beach with scattered people

segments.scene_description: The character begins on a paved coastal promenade next to a stone retaining wall, with the beach and ocean sunset visible ahead. The character walks forward and steps onto the sand, transitioning from the tiled walkway to the beach proper.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach with scattered beachgoers and umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking across the dry sand toward the ocean shoreline, passing other beachgoers

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the shoreline

entered.detail: thatched umbrellas providing shade on the beach
rock outcroppings visible in the ocean distance
vegetated hills rising along the coastline

segments.scene_description: Walking across the expansive sandy beach toward the ocean, passing scattered groups of pedestrians and beach umbrellas. The stone promenade falls behind as the character approaches the shoreline, with coastal hills visible to the left and rock formations in the distant ocean.

events.description: character walks into the shallow ocean water

agents.ego_description: walking into the shallow surf and continuing along the water's edge as waves lap at the shore

notable_agents.action: pedestrians standing at the water's edge watching the waves

entered.detail: calm shallow water with gentle waves lapping at the shore
dark wet sand reflecting the sunset colors

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow ocean water, walking along the shoreline as gentle waves roll in. The wet sand reflects the golden sunset light, and a few pedestrians can be seen standing at the water's edge to the left while the open ocean stretches ahead.

events.description: character turns left and walks back toward the beach away from the water

agents.ego_description: turning away from the ocean and walking back toward the beach where vehicles are parked

notable_agents.action: dark jeep parked on the sand

entered.detail: dark colored jeep parked on the beach sand
dense trees and vegetation along the coastline

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and exits the shallow water, walking back onto the dry sand toward parked vehicles. A dark jeep is visible parked on the beach to the left, while coastal vegetation and hills rise in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a structured coastal promenade into the shallow ocean and back onto the sandy shore under a golden sunset. It begins on a paved walkway beside a stone retaining wall, moving forward as the character steps off the tiles and onto the expansive beach. As the promenade recedes, the camera glides past scattered pedestrians and beach umbrellas toward the shoreline, with coastal hills and distant rock formations framing the horizon. The scene then shifts as the character enters the shallow ocean water, where gentle waves roll in and the wet sand reflects the warm evening light. Finally, the camera turns left to exit the water and move back across the dry sand toward parked vehicles and rising coastal vegetation.
